name: atlas-security-privacy
description: Focused local-first security, credential boundary, and privacy eval cases.

cases.query: query-time search retrieval MCP HTTP reads do not fetch remote source content local SQLite corpus

terms: do not fetch remote source content

cases.query: retrieval remains store-backed query time does not fetch remote repositories or read credentials
cases.scenario: retrieval planning avoids source adapters and credentials

cases.query: Atlas does not upload indexed corpus content to external services no upload guarantee

terms: does not upload indexed corpus content

cases.query: GHES tokens env vars GitHub CLI credentials must not be written config logs diagnostics OpenAPI MCP output snapshots
cases.scenario: credential values are referenced and not persisted

cases.query: secrets should be referenced by environment variable name not written into config files diagnostics errors

terms: Secrets should be referenced by environment variable name

cases.query: GitHub CLI token env var only explicit GHES GitHub artifact fetch least-privilege read tokens
cases.scenario: auth is explicit and read-scoped for artifact fetch

terms: GitHub CLI or token env var only

cases.query: artifact JSON must not contain secrets absolute machine-local paths artifact verify secret path safety
cases.scenario: artifact metadata avoids secrets and machine paths

terms: Artifact JSON must not contain secrets

cases.query: public artifacts exclude internal docs credentials machine-local paths visibility internal private profile safety
redacts token-like context values review diagnostics do not include tokens cookies private URLs proprietary document content
cases.scenario: troubleshooting docs define safe sharing boundary
